definition: Country-level annual average air temperature in °C. Static published/compiled baseline; not a weather forecast and not stadium-specific.
Country-level mean elevation above sea level in metres. Static published/compiled baseline; not match venue elevation.
Approximate stadium or host-city elevation above sea level in metres.
Host-city June average temperature in °C for pre-tournament fixture condition analysis; not live forecast.
Host-city July average temperature in °C for pre-tournament fixture condition analysis; not live forecast.
Primary display time. Kickoff time converted into the local timezone at the match venue.
UTC representation of kickoff for sorting, joins, and user-local conversion.
Club as listed in the official FIFA squad list PDF.
